name.description: The name of the hook. This is used to identify the hook in the registry. It should be unique for your registry.

type.description: The type of the item. Must be 'registry:hook' for useKit hooks.

description.description: The description of the hook. This is used to provide a brief overview of the hook.

title.description: The human-readable title for your hook. Keep it short and descriptive.

dependencies.description: An array of NPM dependencies required by the hook.

devDependencies.description: An array of NPM dev dependencies required by the hook.

registryDependencies.description: An array of registry hooks that this hook depends on. Use the name of the hook to reference other hooks in the registry.

files.description: The main payload of the registry hook. This is an array of files that are part of the hook. Each file is an object with a path, content, and type.

path.description: The path to the file relative to the registry root.

type.description: The type of the file. Must be 'registry:hook' for useKit hooks.
